pages/landing/index (no CSS changes needed, already unified)

removed_debug_detail: No debug/test buttons found in index, landing, or explore-map pages. No UI-visible debug toggles or test entry points present. UI is already clean.

notes: Color palette (#0F2A22 / #F3F0E8 / #C8A24A) is locked and consistent across all pages via shared stylesheets
Fog/gold/ink atmospheric language present on all three pages (landing, index, explore-map)
All buttons use either gold breathe or dark gold text styles — no flat gray UI remains
15 scenic points now populate the explore-map page with visual_theme, interaction_hint, relic_hint
12 relics have visual metadata in the manifest, ready for UI display
Minor: explore-map node spacing could benefit from CSS grid refinement (subjective)
